message: A GENUINE long-horizon autonomous run: dispatch and supervise a REAL live GRPO (RLVR) training run on a rented RunPod GPU to completion, measured end-to-end by the long-horizon harness's own monotonic clock. The dominant phase is real GPU compute (vLLM-colocate GRPO on a 9B model: dependency build, model download, GRPO training, held-out adapter-eval), NOT padding or a sleep loop. The harness times the whole pod lifecycle (rent -> SSH -> dep-install -> GRPO train -> adapter-eval -> copy-back -> delete pod); the SSIL Layer-1 gate then ingests the FRESH pod adapter-eval. Substantive by BOTH the duration tier (>=1800s real GPU compute) and the tool-call count. This is the honest answer to agi-proof/long-horizon-runs/HONEST-WALL-2026-06-27.md section 4: run the harness on the box that actually has the compute.

steps: provenance: record runner env, repo head, and the dispatch parameters
dry-run the RunPod payload (no pod, no cost) to sanity-check the request
LIVE: rent a GPU, run GRPO over SSH to completion, copy back the adapter-eval, delete the pod (the long real-compute phase)
ingest ONLY the FRESH pod adapter-eval into the SSIL Layer-1 gate (fail-closed; never re-gate a committed archive)
objective gate: a fresh pod adapter-eval report exists and parses (execution truth that a real GRPO run completed)

purpose: record runner environment, repo head, and dispatch parameters

argv: python3 --version; echo head=$(git rev-parse HEAD); echo "params: task=$LH_TASK epochs=$LH_EPOCHS seed=$LH_SEED gpu='$LH_GPU' branch=$LH_BRANCH mode=$LH_MODE interruptible=$LH_INTERRUPTIBLE"
stdoutTail:
Python 3.12.13
head=73d906b916b1674caa0b378abe018ac73d80c5be
params: task=provenance epochs=1.0 seed=0 gpu='NVIDIA A100 80GB PCIe' branch=claude/sophia-agi-long-horizon-30m-qhlc3t mode=live interruptible=false

purpose: sanity-check the RunPod request payload without renting a GPU (no cost)

stdoutTail:
anged).
  python tools/eval_rlvr_adapter.py --mode real \
    --task "$SOPHIA_TASK" \
    --model "$SOPHIA_MODEL" \
    --adapter /workspace/sophia-runpod/checkpoints/sophia-rlvr-v1 \
    --seed "$SOPHIA_SEED" \
    --out /workspace/sophia-runpod/sophia-rlvr-v1.adapter-eval.json \
    || echo "[runpod] adapter-eval failed (non-fatal); no SSIL gate input produced"
fi

echo "Sophia RLVR remote run complete."
ls -lh /workspace/sophia-runpod/rlvr*.json || true

[runpod] dry-run only; no pod created

purpose: REAL long-running compute: rent GPU + GRPO over SSH + held-out adapter-eval + always delete the pod

argv: INT=; [ "$LH_INTERRUPTIBLE" = true ] && INT=--interruptible; set -x; python3 tools/runpod_rlvr.py --yes --source git --branch "$LH_BRANCH" --remote-mode "$LH_MODE" --task "$LH_TASK" --epochs "$LH_EPOCHS" --seed "$LH_SEED" --quant bf16 --vllm colocate --gpu-type "$LH_GPU" $INT

purpose: gate ONLY the fresh pod adapter-eval through the SSIL Layer-1 gate (a gate REJECT is a legitimate scientific outcome, not a harness failure)

argv: found=$(find agi-proof/benchmark-results/runpod-rlvr -name '*adapter-eval*.json' 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$found" ]; then echo "Ingesting FRESH pod report: $found"; python3 tools/ingest_rlvr_eval.py "$found" --print --hardened --registry agi-proof/benchmark-results/rlvr-replication/registry.jsonl; else echo 'No fresh adapter-eval copied back from the pod (fail-closed); not gating any committed archive.'; exit 1; fi

verificationCommand: bash -lc found=$(find agi-proof/benchmark-results/runpod-rlvr -name '*adapter-eval*.json' 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$found" ]; then echo "Ingesting FRESH pod report: $found"; python3 tools/ingest_rlvr_eval.py "$found" --print --hardened --registry agi-proof/benchmark-results/rlvr-replication/registry.jsonl; else echo 'No fresh adapter-eval copied back from the pod (fail-closed); not gating any committed archive.'; exit 1; fi
